title: TMB follow-up: hypermutator classification + empirical concordance + tooling (rescoped t025)
rescope_note: Original t025 scope (FoCR / Buchhalter harmonization) fully covered by t026. Rescoped to hypermutator classification, empirical panel-vs-WES concordance studies, and TMB implementation tooling — supports t081.
explicitly_out_of_scope: Merino 2020 (FoCR Phase I, PMID 32217756) — in bib via t026
Vega 2021 (FoCR Phase II, PMID 34606929) — in bib via t026

results.title: Comprehensive Analysis of Hypermutation in Human Cancer
results.why_it_matters: Hypermutator/ultramutator classification reference; 10 / 100 mut/Mb cutoffs; POLE/POLD1 replication-repair etiology.

results.title: Analysis of 100,000 human cancer genomes reveals the landscape of tumor mutational burden
results.why_it_matters: FoundationOne 100k-cohort TMB landscape; panel-vs-WES concordance; 2.4x age-TMB effect.

results.title: Tumor mutational load predicts survival after immunotherapy across multiple cancer types
results.why_it_matters: MSK-IMPACT 1662 ICI + 5371 non-ICI; 3% of coding exome sufficient for TMB ranking; per-histology cutpoints vary markedly.

results.title: Association of tumour mutational burden with outcomes in patients with advanced solid tumours treated with pembrolizumab: prospective biomarker analysis of the multicohort, open-label, phase 2 KEYNOTE-158 study
results.why_it_matters: Established >=10 mut/Mb tTMB-high cutoff; led to FDA pembrolizumab TMB-H indication.

results.title: Impact of panel design and cut-off on tumour mutational burden assessment in metastatic solid tumour samples
results.why_it_matters: In-silico 7-panel vs WES ROC analysis; misclassification 30%->1% near decision boundaries.

results.title: Beyond microsatellite testing: assessment of tumor mutational burden identifies subsets of colorectal cancer who may respond to immune checkpoint inhibition
results.why_it_matters: MSI-H / TMB-H non-1:1 intersection in CRC; POLE-hypermutator MSS subset.

results.title: German NGS consortium multi-panel TMB correlation studies
results.why_it_matters: Multi-panel vs WES TMB concordance at clinical-quality-assessment scale.

results.title: The spectrum of benefit from checkpoint blockade in hypermutated tumors
results.why_it_matters: Universal-cutoff critique; per-cancer-type TMB-H does not give uniform ICI benefit.

results.title: FDA Approval Summary: Pembrolizumab for the Treatment of Tumor Mutational Burden-High Solid Tumors
results.why_it_matters: Regulatory operationalization of TMB >=10 mut/Mb tissue-agnostic.

results.title: Tumor Mutational Burden as a Predictive Biomarker in Solid Tumors
Two-layer Poisson panel-to-WES TMB correction (jasonwong-lab/TMB)
results.why_it_matters: Implementation tool for panel->WES TMB correction; referenced in Nat Rev Clin Oncol 2024 review.

results.title: Comprehensively Exploring the Mutational Landscape and Patterns of Genomic Evolution in Hypermutated Cancers
results.why_it_matters: Overlaps Campbell 2017; cite only if needed.

results.title: Enhancing the quality of panel-based tumor mutation burden assessment: a comprehensive study of real-world and in-silico outcomes
results.why_it_matters: Recent (2024) panel-TMB benchmark; successor to Budczies 2020.
